title: CCDR: Volume 47-5/6, May/June 2021: Responding to New Clusters of COVID-19 - Canada.ca

## CCDR: Volume 47-5/6, May/June 2021: Responding to New Clusters of COVID-19
- Information for authors
Surveillance Population surveillance approach to detect and respond to new clusters of COVID-19 EE Rees, R Rodin, NH Ogden
Trends in HIV pre-exposure prophylaxis use in eight Canadian provinces, 2014–2018 N Popovic, Q Yang, C Archibald

Overview Bioaerosols from mouth-breathing: Under-recognized transmissible mode in COVID-19? S Balasubramanian, D Vinayachandran
Demonstrating the capacity of the National Advisory Committee on Immunization for timely responses to post-market vaccine monitoring signals: Canada’s experience with the live-attenuated influenza vaccine L Zhao, K Young, A House, R Stirling, M Tunis
Qualitative studies Environmental scan of provincial and territorial planning for COVID-19 vaccination programs in Canada S MacDonald, H Sell, S Wilson, S Meyer, A Gagneur, A Assi, M Sadarangani, and members of the COVImm Study Team
Series The National Collaborating Centre for Methods and Tools (NCCMT): Supporting evidence-informed decision-making in public health in Canada H Husson, C Howarth, S Neil-Sztramko, M Dobbins
